code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < toks.len()
    match toks.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x < v
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn add_unique(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut acc = sorted
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(acc, v)
        acc = insert_sorted(acc, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  acc
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let a = parse_line(line1)
  let b = parse_line(line2)

  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  sorted = add_unique(sorted, a)
  sorted = add_unique(sorted, b)

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      if k == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
